notes: HRAC file has no Russian active ingredient names in active_ingredients sheet; matching Russian herbicide active substances will require aliases/transliteration or preserving current hardcoded Russian aliases.
IRAC file has active_ingredient_ru mostly empty; matching Russian insecticide active substances will require aliases/transliteration or preserving current hardcoded Russian aliases.
FRAC file includes active_ingredient_ru for many entries and is the most ready for direct Russian matching.
